headline: Adeia Receives Credit Rating Upgrade from S&P Global Ratings
summary: Rating raised from BB- to BB on improved credit metrics, with a stable outlookSAN JOSE, Calif., April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Adeia Inc. (Nasdaq: ADEA), the technology company known for developing foundational innovations that enable next-generation solutions for the semiconductor and media industries, today announced that S&P Global Ratings (S&P) has upgraded the Company’s issuer credit rating to ‘BB’ from ‘BB-’, with a stable outlook. The upgrade reflects Adeia’s continued execution again

headline: S&P Global to Present at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference on May 5, 2026
summary: Martina Cheung, President and Chief Executive Officer of S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI), will participate in the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Franchise Conference on May 5, 2026 in London, UK. Ms. Cheung is scheduled to speak from 11:30 a.m. to 12:10 p.m. British Summer Time (6:30 a.m. to 7:10 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time). The "fireside chat" will be webcast and may include forward-looking information. Mark Grant, Senior Vice President of Investor Relations and Treasurer, will join for investor

headline: Eli Lilly Stock Jumps on Earnings Beat as Zepbound and Mounjaro Sales Skyrocket

headline: Revisiting Stock Picks S&P Global, Charles Schwab, Viking Holdings
summary: Reviewing past stock picks is essential because it provides accountability and sharpens the investment process, helping identify what worked, what didn’t, and why.  That bounce was short lived, a red flag, and has since floundered.
